data.body: LANDED. Gerrit 816 received LLM-Review +1 (rebar review bot, PASS) AND Verified +1 (rebar CI bot, SUCCESS — GitHub Actions run 29674658120) on Patch Set 1. Submitted and MERGED to main at 2026-07-19 05:39:43 UTC (Gerrit status MERGED). Both required votes landed before submit; the [operator-attested] landing criterion is satisfied. Local proving commands all passed: make lint + mypy src/rebar clean; 112 (changed test modules) + 78 (batch-runner/grounding) tests pass; both AI-1 regression tests green; git grep confirms _HAVE_ASTGREP gone from the two dead-copy files and retained in test_engine_b.py; ruff --select F821 clean (no dangling refs from Tier-2 removals).
